name: 01_Global_System_Vault
message: Security Policy: Access to root system files and credentials is strictly prohibited.

name: 02_Config_DB_Isolation_Linux
message: Security Policy: Shell-based access to config/DB files is blocked. You MUST use native 'read_file' or 'edit_file' tools. 'head' and 'tail' are permitted.

name: 02_Config_DB_Isolation_Windows
message: Security Policy: Shell-based access to config/DB files is blocked on Windows. Use native tools.

name: 02_Config_DB_Isolation_MacOS
message: Security Policy: Shell-based access to config/DB files is blocked on macOS. Use native tools.

name: 03_Secret_Hunting_Dumping_Linux
message: Security Policy: Environment dumping and bulk secret scanning are prohibited.

name: 03_Secret_Hunting_Dumping_Windows
message: Security Policy: Environment dumping and secret scanning are prohibited on Windows.

name: 05_Bad_Regex_And_Redirection_Linux
message: Security Policy: Destructive commands, stream editors (sed/awk), and arbitrary file redirection are blocked.

name: 05_Bad_Regex_And_Redirection_Windows
message: Security Policy: Destructive commands and file redirection are blocked on Windows.

name: 07_Sudo_And_Blind_Execution_Global
message: Security Policy: Sudo privileges and piping web scripts directly to shell are strictly blocked.

name: 10_MacOS_Keychain_Protection
message: Security Policy: Access to macOS Keychains is strictly prohibited.

name: 11_Windows_Registry_Protection
message: Security Policy: Direct Windows Registry modification is prohibited via shell tools.
